name_cn: High PV with Distributed Energy Storage Coordination Scenario
name_en: High PV with Distributed Energy Storage Coordination Scenario
description_cn: Coordinates multi-node distributed energy storage systems to absorb high PV generation, support peak demand, balance local generation and load, and mitigate reverse flow and overvoltage.
description_en: Simulates coordinated scheduling of multi-node BESS to absorb high PV generation and support grid during peak load.
typical_user_requests: Use storage charging to absorb high PV output

use_ess.description: Whether distributed energy storage is enabled; it is required for this scenario.

add_ess_kwh.description: Added distributed energy storage rated capacity.

validation_rules.message_cn: Energy storage must be enabled for a coordinated PV-storage absorption scenario; the current configuration conflicts with the scenario semantics.
The PV multiplier is low for a high-PV absorption scenario and may not fully demonstrate PV-storage absorption or voltage-violation control effects.

result_interpretation_focus: Inspect energy-storage charging and discharging from 10:00 to 14:00 to evaluate peak-shaving and PV-absorption effectiveness.
Analyze voltage improvements at feeder-end violation points to confirm overvoltage mitigation from PV-storage coordination.
Measure curtailment and net-load variability to determine whether the control strategy achieves local generation-load balance.
